sections.paragraph:
Original: כּוּתה כּוּת

Transliteration: kûth kûthâh

Phonetic: kooth

BDB Definition:

Cuth = "crushing"
  1. a place from which king Sargon of Assyria imported colonists into Israel; probably a location approx 20 (32 kilometers) miles northeast of Babylon

Origin: of foreign origin

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
